resources.string: From shared video to map, automatically
InstaMaps downloads the video you share, reads its caption and on-screen text, asks Gemini where it was filmed, and opens that exact spot in Google Maps - all on your device.
InstaMaps sends the video\'s caption and on-screen text to Google\'s Gemini model to figure out which real-world place it shows. A free key from Google AI Studio is required for that lookup to work.
Finding a location can take a moment, especially right after you share a video. InstaMaps notifies you the instant it\'s done so you don\'t have to keep the app open and wait.
This permission is required for InstaMaps to work properly.
